title: Simple Create Radios
description: A new look to the SimpleRadio mod, more in line with the Create mod.
body:
I always like the [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) mod in the past, to play with friends and get more immersed, but the lack of long distance communication always felt annoying.

That was before I discovered [Simple Voice Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-radio), a mod I wanted to harmonize with my favorite mod of all time, [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) !

![Transceiver Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c353f3a1fc684060121f87d60227a71d8f10209b.png) I made this pack for me, my friends and all of you to talk with a steampunky style !![Radio Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3877d52c58d7ee2784e58a1d5dc5906f988f0036.png)

You **MUST** use [Simple Voice Radio](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-radio), [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to use this resource pack.

Playing with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) is the intended goal of the pack, but it is not required.\
[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) is recommended as it enhances the proximity chat experience.

As far as I'm aware, the pack is incompatible with Optifine, I haven't tried to see if it works and likely never will.
